title: Set 5: A Visit to the Hospital 🏥
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Last week, my friend Sarah didn't come to school. I was worried, so my mum took me to see her at the
. When we arrived, Sarah was lying in bed. She

very tired and her face was quite red.

A kind
came in to check on her. She used a small machine to take Sarah's
. It was very high, so Sarah had to stay in bed and rest. The woman gave her some

to drink. It tasted like strawberries, so Sarah didn't mind taking it.

The room was very quiet, so we
when we talked. Sarah told me she hopes to be better by Saturday because she wants to go to the park. I brought her a funny book to read while she waits to go home.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A trip to the toy shop

explanations_vi: Sarah nằm trên giường và cảm thấy (felt) rất mệt mỏi.
Một y tá (nurse) tốt bụng bước vào để kiểm tra cho bạn ấy.
Y tá dùng máy nhỏ để đo nhiệt độ (temperature) của Sarah.
Người phụ nữ cho Sarah uống một ít thuốc (medicine) vị dâu tây.
Phòng bệnh rất yên tĩnh nên chúng tôi đã thì thầm (whispered) khi nói chuyện.
Tiêu đề B (Thăm một người bạn bị ốm) là đúng nhất vì toàn bộ câu chuyện kể về việc tác giả đến bệnh viện thăm người bạn tên Sarah.
